posts.author: MericaFukYeah
posts.title: Supreme Court Vacates Decision Outlawing Gas Stoves, Water Heaters

link_metadata.description: On Monday, the Supreme Court vacated a lower court ruling that upheld Biden Energy Department regulations that would outlaw gas stoves and water heaters in Americans’ homes and require homeowners with these to either renovate their homes or switch to electric appliances. In American Gas Association, et al. V. Dept. Of Energy, et al, the District of Columbia’s district court upheld the Biden Administration’s regulations banning the use of non-condensing appliances, effectively eliminating gas furnaces and water heaters from the marketplace.
link_metadata.title: Supreme Court Vacates Decision Outlawing Gas Stoves, Water Heaters
